description: Letter from Yosef b. Labrāṭ al-Fāsī (Qayrawan) to Yaʿaqov b. Yosef b. ʿAwkal (Fustat). The writer apologizes for a delay in returning a debt of 10 dinars that Yaʿaqov b. Yosef b. ʿAwkal lent him and explains that the delay is due to difficulties that he encountered when selling the merchandise bought with this money. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, p. 291.)
description_he: מכתב מיוסף בן לברט אל-פאסי, קיירואן, ליעקב בן יוסף בן עוקאל, פוסטאט, על עיכוב בהחזרת חוב של 10 דינרים
